zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thomas Crooke於1567年9月2日出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆時，他的父親William Crook18歲，母親Ellen Martin17歲。他於1588年7月10日與Margaret Hawkins在英國維爾爾特洛布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Thomas Crooke于1567年9月2日出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆时，他的父亲William Crook18岁，母亲Ellen Martin17岁。他于1588年7月10日与Margaret Hawkins在英国維爾爾特洛布利其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Crooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Thomas Crooke was born on 2 September 1567, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, his father, William Crook, was 18 and his mother, Ellen Martin, was 17. He married Margaret Hawkins on 10 July 1588, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Kirkham, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Thomas Crooke est né le 2 septembre 1567, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Crook, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Ellen Martin, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hawkins le 10 juillet 1588, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Thomas Crooke am 2. September 1567 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Crook 18 und seine Mutter Ellen Martin 17. Er hat am 10. Juli 1588 in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England Margaret Hawkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Kirkham, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Thomas Crooke è nato il il 2 settembre 1567 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Crook, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Martin, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hawkins il 10 luglio 1588, nel Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolto a Kirkham, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thomas Crookeが1567年9月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムで生まれた時，父William Crookは18歳，母Ellen Martinは17歳であった。1588年7月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジでMargaret Hawkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Thomas Crooke(이)가 1567년 9월 2일 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Crook(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Martin(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1588년 7월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 Margaret Hawkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 랭카실르 커카에 묻혔다.

pt.2 September 1567–16 March 1619: 2 de setembro de 1567–16 de março de 1619
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Thomas Crooke nasceu em 2 de setembro de 1567, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Crook, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Martin, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hawkins em 10 de julho de 1588, em Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thomas Crooke родился 2 сентября 1567 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Crook было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Martin, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hawkins 10 июля 1588 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия.

es.2 September 1567–16 March 1619: 2 de septiembre de 1567–16 de marzo de 1619
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Thomas Crooke nació el 2 de septiembre de 1567, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Crook, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Ellen Martin, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Hawkins el 10 de julio de 1588, en Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Fue sepultado en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
